sql.query: SELECT c.id,COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ',c.firstName,c.lastName)),''),NULLIF(c.displayName,''),NULLIF(c.organisationName,''),'Unnamed contact') AS contactName,c.organisationName,COALESCE(cc.categoryName,c.contactType) AS categoryName,CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ',c.firstName,c.lastName)),''),NULLIF(c.displayName,''),NULLIF(c.organisationName,''),'Unnamed contact'),CASE WHEN c.organisationName IS NOT NULL AND c.organisationName<>'' THEN CONCAT(' - ',c.organisationName) ELSE '' END) AS contactLabel FROM tbl_contacts c LEFT JOIN tbl_contact_categories cc ON cc.contactCategoryId=c.contactCategoryId AND cc.tenantId=c.tenantId WHERE c.tenantId=:tenantId AND c.isActive=1 ORDER BY contactName,c.organisationName
